buildDriver: wasm-pack 0.15.0 in CI; exact Cargo plus wasm-bindgen 0.2.100 compatibility path on locked-down Windows
buildAdjustment: Uses protobuf.rs, message_type.rs and maps.rs committed at the pinned upstream revision instead of a moving clone or nested generator, removes the unused wasm-bindgen-file-reader dependency, and compiles every Instant::now profiler plus its elapsed-time read out of the isolated wasm32 build.
